stories.title: Bombshell — Lambiase Leaving Red Bull for McLaren at End of 2027

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
BOMBSHELL. Gianpiero Lambiase — Max Verstappen's race engineer since 2016 — is leaving Red Bull for McLaren at the end of 2027.

Lambiase asked Verstappen for his blessing first. Verstappen: "You would be stupid not to do that."

The end of an era. 🏎️ #F1

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Lambiase is joining McLaren as Chief Racing Officer after the 2027 season.

He's been Verstappen's engineer for all four of his world championships.

If Max's closest ally is already planning his exit... what does Max do? 🤔 #F1

article.headline: Gianpiero Lambiase Is Leaving Red Bull for McLaren — and the Verstappen Question Grows Louder

research.facts:
Lambiase Leaving Red Bull for McLaren
**Sources:**
- Formula1.com: "Max Verstappen's race engineer Gianpiero Lambiase to leave Red Bull in 2028"
- ESPN: "Max Verstappen's trusted Red Bull engineer to join McLaren as chief racing officer"
- ESPN: "Max Verstappen on Gianpiero Lambiase's exit: 'You would be stupid not to do that'"
- GPBlog.com: "Mekies lifts lid on Lambiase exit as McLaren pull off major coup"
- Formula1.com: "Analysis: What we know about Gianpiero Lambiase's move from Red Bull to McLaren"
**Verified Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Lambiase will leave Red Bull at end of 2027 contract — multiple sources (formula1.com official)
- Lambiase joining McLaren as Chief Racing Officer — multiple sources
- Lambiase has worked with Verstappen since 2016 Toro Rosso promotion — multiple sources
- Verstappen quote: "You would be stupid not to do that" — multiple sources (ESPN, GPFans)
- Lambiase sought Verstappen's blessing before deciding — multiple sources
- Red Bull team boss Laurent Mekies broke silence on departure — multiple sources
**Freshness:** Announced April 28-29, 2026 — fully fresh for April 29 content.

stories.title: Miami Race Week — Sprint Format, Upgrade War, and Antonelli's Title Defence

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
IT'S MIAMI RACE WEEK. 🇺🇸

F1 returns after a 5-week gap with a Sprint weekend:
📅 FP1 + Sprint Quali: Friday May 1
🏎️ Sprint: Saturday May 2
🏁 Race: Sunday May 3, 4 PM ET

Antonelli leads by 9 pts. Every team has a major upgrade. #F1Miami

article.headline: Miami Race Week Is Here — Antonelli's Championship Lead Meets Its Biggest Test Yet

research.facts:
Miami Race Week Preview
**Sources:**
- Formula1.com: Race week 5 storylines article
- RacingNews365: 2026 Miami GP time schedule
- Sky Sports: Miami GP 2026 Sprint weekend dates, schedule, weather, UK start time
**Verified Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Sprint weekend format: FP1 May 1 (Friday), Sprint Quali May 1, Sprint May 2 (Saturday), Qualifying May 2, Race May 3 (Sunday) — formula1.com
- FP1 extended to 90 minutes (only practice session in Sprint weekend) — prior pipelines + confirmed
- Race: May 3 at 4PM ET — prior pipeline + confirmed
- Antonelli championship lead: 72 pts (Russell 63 pts, 9-point gap) — prior pipeline status
- Mercedes constructors' lead: 135 pts (Ferrari 90, McLaren 56, Red Bull 16) — prior pipeline status
- 5-week gap due to Bahrain/Saudi cancellations — prior pipeline
- Cadillac special livery announced — formula1.com, The Race, Motorsport.com
**Freshness:** Race week officially underway — highly timely preview content.

stories.title: Ferrari vs McLaren — Miami Upgrade War Is the Real Championship Battle

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Ferrari: full SF-26 debut. Macarena wing. Revised software. ~50% of car changed since Japan.

McLaren: "completely new car from aerodynamic standpoint." (Stella's words.)

Mercedes has a 45-pt constructors' lead.

Miami is an upgrade-off. 🔥 #F1 #MiamiGP

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
McLaren had a "double DNS" in China. Now they're bringing a COMPLETELY NEW CAR to Miami.

Ferrari tested at Monza and their results were positive.

The 2026 constructors' title race could look very different by Sunday. 👀 #F1Miami

stories.title: Cadillac's Stars and Stripes — An American Team's First Home Race

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
🇺🇸 Cadillac has unveiled a Stars & Stripes livery for the Miami Grand Prix.

50 stars on the front wing. One for every US state.

The only American F1 team, racing at home, in red, white and blue. 🏁 #F1 #MiamiGP

stories.title: What Does Lambiase's Exit Mean for Verstappen's Red Bull Future?

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Red Bull boss Mekies on Lambiase leaving for McLaren: "The campus is on fire trying to turn things around."

Meanwhile, Verstappen has a reported exit clause. Red Bull is 4th in constructors' with just 16 points.

How much longer does Max stay? 🤔 #F1
